workflow.name: Classify and route cold email replies using Claude and Instantly.ai
workflow.description:
# Overview :

Automatically reads every reply to your cold email campaigns in Instantly.ai, uses Claude AI to understand the intent, and takes the right action . No need ofmanual inbox checking needed.

## How it works :

- A lead replies to your cold email in Instantly.ai , this workflow starts automatically.
- Claude AI reads the reply and labels it: Interested, Not Now, Unsubscribe, or Referral.
- Each label triggers a different action calendar email, 30-day follow-up, opt-out removal, or referral ask.
- Every reply gets logged to a Google Sheet automatically.

## Setup steps :

1. Instantly webhook — In Instantly → Settings → Webhooks, add a new webhook. Paste the URL from the Receive Instantly Reply node and set the trigger to Reply Received.
2. Claude AI — Click the Claude Haiku node, add your Anthropic API key from console.anthropic.com. Costs less than $0.01 per reply.
3. Google Sheets — Create a sheet with these column headers: Timestamp | First Name | Last Name | Email | Company | Reply | Classification | Campaign. Connect your Google account in all four Log to Sheets nodes.
4. Gmail — Connect your Gmail in Send Calendar Link and Send Referral Reply. Replace {{CALENDAR_LINK}} with your booking link.
5. Slack (optional) — Connect Slack in Notify Slack - Hot Lead and pick a channel. Don’t use Slack? Right-click the node → Disable.
6. Instantly re-sequence — In Re-add to Instantly Sequence, add your Instantly API key and replace {{SEQUENCE_ID}} with your follow-up sequence ID.
7. Activate the workflow and send a test reply to confirm everything works.

workflow.name: AI Cold Email Reply Classifier & Auto-Router using Claude + Instantly.ai

parameters.content:
## AI Cold Email Reply Classifier & Auto-Router using Claude + Instantly.ai

Never manually check your inbox for cold email replies again. This workflow reads every reply, understands the intent using Claude AI, and automatically takes the right action.

### How it works

1. When a lead replies to your cold email in Instantly.ai, it triggers this workflow instantly via webhook.
2. The reply is sent to Claude AI (Haiku), which reads it and labels it as one of four intents: Interested, Not Now, Unsubscribe, or Referral.
3. Interested replies get a Slack alert and an automated email with your calendar booking link.
4. Not Now replies are logged and automatically followed up after 30 days.
5. Unsubscribe replies remove the contact from all Instantly sequences via the API.
6. Referral replies get a personalised email asking for an introduction.
7. Every reply — regardless of intent — is logged to a Google Sheet for tracking.

### Setup steps

- [ ] **Instantly.ai webhook** — Go to Instantly → Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → Add Webhook. Paste the URL from the *Receive Instantly Reply* node and set the trigger to *Reply Received*. Activate this workflow first so the URL is generated.
- [ ] **Claude AI** — Click the *Claude Haiku* sub-node under *Classify Reply Intent*, create a new credential, and paste your API key from console.anthropic.com. Costs fractions of a cent per reply.
- [ ] **Google Sheets** — Create a new sheet with these headers in Row 1: 'Timestamp | First Name | Last Name | Email | Company | Reply | Classification | Campaign'. Connect your Google account in all four *Log to Sheets* nodes and select your sheet.
- [x] **Gmail** — Connect your Gmail account in *Send Calendar Link* and *Send Referral Reply*. Replace 'YOUR_CALENDAR_LINK' with your Calendly or Cal.com link.
- [ ] **Slack** *(optional)* — Connect your Slack account in *Notify Slack - Hot Lead* and pick a channel like '#hot-leads'. If you don't use Slack, right-click the node and select Disable.
- [ ] **Instantly re-sequence** — In *Re-add to Instantly Sequence*, add your Instantly API key and replace 'YOUR_SEQUENCE_ID' with the ID of your warm follow-up sequence (found in the sequence URL inside Instantly).
- [ ] Activate the workflow, send a test reply in Instantly, and confirm all four branches work correctly.

### Customization

Swap the Slack node for Discord or Telegram if preferred. Change the 30-day wait in the Not Now branch to any delay that suits your sales cycle.

## Receive & extract reply

Instantly.ai sends the reply here the moment a lead responds. This step pulls out the key details — name, email, company, and reply text — ready for Claude to read.

## Classify intent with Claude

Claude Haiku reads the reply and returns one word: INTERESTED, NOT_NOW, UNSUBSCRIBE, or REFERRAL. The model is set to zero temperature so the output is always consistent and predictable.

## Route by intent

Takes Claude's one-word label and sends the reply down the correct branch. Each of the four outputs connects to a different set of actions below.

## Interested branch

The lead wants to know more or book a call. Sends a Slack alert so you know immediately, emails the lead your calendar link, then logs the reply to Google Sheets.

> Slack is optional — right-click the Slack node and select Disable if you don't use it.

## Referral branch

The lead referred someone else or asked you to contact a different person. Sends them a friendly reply asking for an introduction, then logs the reply to Google Sheets.

## Not now branch

The lead isn't ready yet but hasn't said no. Logs the reply immediately, waits 30 days, then automatically re-adds them to a warm follow-up sequence in Instantly. Change the wait duration to suit your sales cycle.

## Unsubscribe branch

The lead wants to opt out. Calls the Instantly API to remove them from all active sequences, then logs the event to Google Sheets so you have a record.

parameters.text:
=You are a cold email reply classifier. Read the reply below and classify it into exactly one of these 4 categories:
INTERESTED - They want to know more, book a call, or showed positive intent
NOT_NOW - They are not ready now but did not say no permanently (busy, wrong timing, follow up later)
UNSUBSCRIBE - They want to be removed, said stop, not interested, or any variation of opt-out
REFERRAL - They referred someone else or asked you to contact a different person
Reply with ONE WORD ONLY. No punctuation. No explanation. Just the category.
Reply to classify:
{{ $('Extract Reply Data').item.json.reply_body }}

Hot lead replied! {{ $('Extract Reply Data').item.json.lead_first_name }} {{ $('Extract Reply Data').item.json.lead_last_name }} — {{ $('Extract Reply Data').item.json.lead_email }} is interested.

Reply: {{ $('Extract Reply Data').item.json.reply_body }}

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $('Extract Reply Data').item.json.lead_first_name }},

Thanks for getting back to me — really appreciate it!

Grab a time that works for you here:

YOUR_CALENDAR_LINK

Looking forward to speaking!

Best,
[Your Name]
parameters.subject: Let's find a time to connect

parameters.message:
Hey {{ $('Extract Reply Data').item.json.lead_first_name }},

Totally understand!

Quick question — is there anyone in your network who might be dealing with this problem? Happy to make it worth your while.

No worries either way — appreciate your time!

Best,
[Your Name]
parameters.subject: Quick question for you

user.name: Akshay Chug
user.bio:
Akshay is a B2B automation specialist helping business owners eliminate manual backend processes through AI-driven workflow automation. With deep expertise in n8n, AI agents, and end-to-end pipeline building, he helps companies automate cold outreach, lead follow-up, and core operations — without adding headcount.

Founder of Sunsky AI.
